main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'sílice etapa 2 + operar 82% + sílice rechazo > límite antiincrustante sin recalcular' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Reducir recovery 75% manteniendo sílice ≤260 mg/L + CIP alcalino 1.0% pH 11.5-12 35°C 60 min — match gold.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: depósito sin sílice + predominio CaCO3/biomasa/particulado → switch.
